zh.Holme, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾霍爾梅
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Holmes於1248年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾霍爾梅時，他的父親Sir Stephen Holm41歲，母親Milicent de Sutton41歲。他於1268年12月24日與Anconetta de la Twyer在英國林可爾史爾霍爾梅結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1286年12月24日在英國林可爾史爾霍爾梅享年38歲。

nameMeanings.name: Holmes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: either from the plural form of Holme , or else a variant of Holme or Home , with excrescent -s (see Holm ).

Scottish: probably a habitational name from Holmes near Dundonald (Ayrshire), or possibly from another place so called in the barony of Inchestuir (Angus). Both placenames likely derive from the plural form of Middle English, Older Scots holm ‘islet, raised land in a marsh’ (see Holm ).

Scottish and Irish: adopted for Scottish Gaelic and Irish Mac Thómais, Mac Thómais (see McComb ). In parts of western Ireland, Holmes is also a variant of Cavish, from Gaelic Mac Thámhais, another patronymic from Thomas . Early bearers in Ireland were probably immigrants from Scotland.

variants.name: Holme
meanings: English (northwestern England): variant of   Holm   and of   Home   3 and 4.
Danish and Swedish: variant of   Holm   1.

variants.name: Homes
meanings: English: variant of   Holmes   and   Home  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When John Holmes was born in 1248, in Holme, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Stephen Holm, was 41 and his mother, Milicent de Sutton, was 41. He married Anconetta de la Twyer on 24 December 1268, in Holme, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. He died on 24 December 1286, in Holme, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 38.

Il a épousé Anconetta de la Twyer le 24 décembre 1268, à Holme, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 24 décembre 1286, à Holme, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: John Holmes(이)가 1248년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Stephen Holm(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Milicent de Sutton(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1268년 12월 24일 영국 링코실르 홀에서 Anconetta de la Twyer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1286년 12월 24일 영국 링코실르 홀에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Holmes родился в 1248 г. в местности холм, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Stephen Holm было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Milicent de Sutton, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Anconetta de la Twyer 24 декабря 1268 г. в местности холм, линколншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Он умер 24 декабря 1286 г. в местности холм, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 38 лет.
